headline: Are Options Traders Betting on a Big Move in Norwegian Cruise Line Stock?

headline: Norwegian Cruise Line's Q2 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line is expected to announce its second-quarter earnings soon, and Wall Street forecasts a double-digit fall in its profits.
